test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT COUNT(user_id), MAX(user_id), MAX(user_id) + 1, (SELECT 1 + 1 FROM DUAL) FROM t_user WHERE user_id = ? GROUP BY user_id) temp
SELECT temp.* FROM (SELECT COUNT(user_id), MAX(user_id), MAX(user_id) + 1, (SELECT 1 + 1 FROM DUAL) FROM t_user WHERE user_id = ? GROUP BY user_id) temp

SELECT * FROM (SELECT COUNT(user_id) AS user_id_count, MAX(user_id) AS user_id_max, MAX(user_id) + 1 AS user_id_expression_max, (SELECT 1 + 1 FROM DUAL) AS subquery_expression FROM t_user WHERE user_id = ? GROUP BY user_id) temp

SELECT temp.* FROM (SELECT COUNT(user_id) AS user_id_count, MAX(user_id) AS user_id_max, MAX(user_id) + 1 AS user_id_expression_max, (SELECT 1 + 1 FROM DUAL) AS subquery_expression FROM t_user WHERE user_id = ? GROUP BY user_id) temp
SELECT * FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM t_user u WHERE user_id = ? GROUP BY user_id) temp
SELECT temp.* FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM t_user u WHERE user_id = ? GROUP BY user_id) temp
SELECT * FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS `distinct_count` FROM t_user u GROUP BY user_id) temp
SELECT temp.* FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS `distinct_count` FROM t_user u GROUP BY user_id) temp
SELECT * FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS distinct_count FROM t_user u GROUP BY user_id) temp
SELECT temp.* FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS distinct_count FROM t_user u GROUP BY user_id) temp
SELECT * FROM (SELECT u.user_id AS "user_id", u.telephone AS "telephone", m.merchant_id AS "merchantId" FROM t_user u INNER JOIN t_merchant m ON u.telephone = m.telephone WHERE u.user_id = ?) t
